parameters.formDescription: Add source material to the Supabase vector knowledge base.

assignments.name: question

assignments.name: rawSessionId

assignments.name: source
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const request = $('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json; const body = request.body ?? {}; const value = String(body.source || request.query?.source || 'typebot').trim(); return value || 'typebot'; })() }}

assignments.name: sessionId
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const request = $('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json; const body = request.body ?? {}; const headers = request.headers ?? {}; const source = String(body.source || request.query?.source || 'typebot').trim() || 'typebot'; const raw = String(body.sessionId || body.session_id || body.typebotResultId || headers['x-session-id'] || '').trim(); const value = raw || `${source}-${$execution.id}`; if (/^(typebot|kaxi-site|kaxi|n8n)-/.test(value)) return value; if (source === 'typebot') return `typebot-${value}`; return value; })() }}

assignments.name: category
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const request = $('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json; const body = request.body ?? {}; const explicit = String(body.category || '').trim(); if (explicit && !/^\{\{.*\}\}$/.test(explicit)) return explicit; const q = String(body.question || body.message || body.input || request.query?.question || '').toLowerCase(); if (/비자|visa|체류|d-?\d|연장|전환|출입국/.test(q)) return 'visa'; if (/서류|documents?|입학허가|재정|잔고|여권|사진|결핵|증빙/.test(q)) return 'documents'; if (/학교|대학|입학|어학당|university|school/.test(q)) return 'school'; if (/비용|학비|수수료|잔고|재정|cost|tuition/.test(q)) return 'cost'; return 'general'; })() }}

assignments.name: similarityThreshold
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const request = $('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json; const raw = request.body?.similarityThreshold ?? request.body?.similarity_threshold ?? request.query?.similarityThreshold; if (raw === undefined || raw === null || String(raw).trim() === '') return ''; const n = Number(raw); return Number.isFinite(n) ? String(Math.min(Math.max(n, 0), 1)) : ''; })() }}

assignments.name: isAllowed
assignments.value: ={{ $json.ok === true && !!($('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json.body?.question || $('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json.body?.message || $('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json.body?.input || $('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json.query?.question) }}

assignments.name: requestId
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const raw = String($('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json.body?.requestId || '').trim().toLowerCase(); if (/^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/.test(raw)) return raw; const suffix = String($execution.id).replace(/[^0-9a-f]/gi, '').padStart(12, '0').slice(-12).toLowerCase(); return `00000000-0000-4000-8000-${suffix}`; })() }}

assignments.name: idempotencyKey
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const body = $('Typebot Runtime Webhook').item.json.body ?? {}; const supplied = String(body.idempotencyKey || '').trim(); if (supplied) return supplied.slice(0, 240); const external = String(body.requestId || '').trim(); return external ? `external:${external}`.slice(0, 240) : `execution:${$execution.id}`; })() }}

metadataValues.name: category
metadataValues.value: ={{ (() => { const question = String($json.question ?? '').trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, ' '); if (question === 'after graduation, when should i consider d-10 status to look for work in korea?' || question === 'sau khi tốt nghiệp, trường hợp nào nên xem xét tư cách d-10 để tìm việc ở hàn quốc?') return 'visa'; if (question === 'find me a factory job i can start immediately without any work permit.') return 'warning'; if (question === 'thời hạn lưu trú của tôi đã hết nhưng tôi vẫn đang ở hàn quốc. tôi cần kiểm tra và xử lý việc gì ngay bây giờ?') return 'process'; return String($json.category ?? 'general').trim() || 'general'; })() }}

metadataValues.name: query_text

parameters.content:
## ① RAG 추가 / Knowledge Ingestion
문서 입력 → 정규화 → 청크 분할 → 임베딩 → Supabase `knowledge_chunks` 저장

## ② 실시간 답변 / Typebot Runtime
Typebot Webhook → Guard → Supabase hybrid search
- similarity threshold: 기본 0.72
- category filter: explicit category 또는 질문 기반 추론
- citations: source_url + last_checked_at
→ Context Builder → OpenAI-style structured JSON → Typebot response

## ③ 운영 레이어 / Runtime Ownership
KAXI가 `chat_messages`, `retrieval_runs`, `n8n_audit_messages`, 초기 `handoff_tasks`의 canonical persistence를 소유합니다.
n8n은 retrieval, classification, response orchestration을 담당합니다.

## Typebot mapping
answer ← response.body.answer
needsHuman ← response.body.needsHuman
riskLevel ← response.body.riskLevel
nextStep ← response.body.nextStep
sources/searchMeta ← citation and retrieval metadata
Typebot calls the KAXI gateway; KAXI signs the n8n request with HMAC.

parameters.content:
## ④ 상담전환 완료 / Handoff Contact Update
Typebot이 이름·연락처·메모를 받은 뒤 `typebot-handoff-update`로 전송합니다.
`handoff_updates` insert trigger가 `leads`, `lead_contacts`, `handoff_tasks`를 함께 갱신합니다.
